commands.review_summary:
The PR adds agent-scoped `tools.codeMode` schema/type/help support, resolves code mode for the active agent, and wires that result into catalog activation plus OpenAI/Codex payload tool filtering.

Reproducibility: yes. Current-main source inspection shows the docs promise agent-level `tools.codeMode`, but the strict per-agent tools schema lacks that key and runtime resolution reads only top-level `tools.codeMode`.
commands.review_followup: The remaining action is contributor or maintainer runtime proof plus draft readiness, not an automated code repair.

target.title: fix(code-mode): honor agent scoped code mode
target.body:
Fixes #83388.

## Summary
- Accept `agents.list[].tools.codeMode` in schema, exported types, labels, and help text.
- Resolve code mode from the active agent, with agent settings overriding the top-level `tools.codeMode` defaults.
- Wire the active-agent result through catalog activation and model payload enforcement so agent-scoped code mode is not accepted as inert config.

## Real behavior proof
Behavior addressed: `agents.list[].tools.codeMode` no longer validates as accepted-but-ineffective config; the active agent's code-mode setting controls schema validation, runtime catalog activation, and payload tool-surface enforcement.
Real environment tested: Local Codex source worktree `/home/captain/codex-workspace/tmp/openclaw-pr-83388`, commit `c25c888c60`, using the repo dependency install already present in `/home/captain/openclaw-source`.
Exact steps or command run after this patch: `env OPENCLAW_VITEST_MAX_WORKERS=1 node --no-maglev node_modules/vitest/vitest.mjs run --config test/vitest/vitest.runtime-config.config.ts src/config/zod-schema.agent-defaults.test.ts`; `env OPENCLAW_VITEST_MAX_WORKERS=1 node --no-maglev node_modules/vitest/vitest.mjs run --config test/vitest/vitest.agents-core.config.ts src/agents/code-mode.test.ts`; `env OPENCLAW_VITEST_MAX_WORKERS=1 node --no-maglev node_modules/vitest/vitest.mjs run --config test/vitest/vitest.unit-fast.config.ts src/agents/pi-embedded-runner/openai-stream-wrappers.test.ts`; `git diff --check`; `/home/captain/openclaw-source/node_modules/.bin/oxfmt --check --threads=1 src/agents/code-mode.ts src/agents/code-mode.test.ts src/agents/pi-embedded-runner/openai-stream-wrappers.ts src/agents/pi-embedded-runner/openai-stream-wrappers.test.ts src/agents/pi-embedded-runner/run/attempt.ts src/config/zod-schema.agent-runtime.ts src/config/types.tools.ts src/config/schema.labels.ts src/config/schema.help.ts src/config/zod-schema.agent-defaults.test.ts`.
Evidence after fix: The schema test accepts boolean and object `tools.codeMode` on an agent while rejecting unknown nested keys; the code-mode tests show active-agent config overrides the top-level default and hides normal tools when only that agent enables code mode; the wrapper test shows an agent-scoped code-mode run sets `openclawCodeModeToolSurface` and filters payload tools to `exec`/`wait`.
Observed result after fix: Focused tests passed: `zod-schema.agent-defaults.test.ts` 27 tests, `code-mode.test.ts` 24 tests, `openai-stream-wrappers.test.ts` 23 tests. `git diff --check` passed, and `oxfmt --check` reported all matched files formatted.
What was not tested: Full gateway/live model run, broad `pnpm check`/remote Crabbox gates, and final review gates. This is opened as draft until those are complete.

## Verification
- `env OPENCLAW_VITEST_MAX_WORKERS=1 node --no-maglev node_modules/vitest/vitest.mjs run --config test/vitest/vitest.runtime-config.config.ts src/config/zod-schema.agent-defaults.test.ts`
- `env OPENCLAW_VITEST_MAX_WORKERS=1 node --no-maglev node_modules/vitest/vitest.mjs run --config test/vitest/vitest.agents-core.config.ts src/agents/code-mode.test.ts`
- `env OPENCLAW_VITEST_MAX_WORKERS=1 node --no-maglev node_modules/vitest/vitest.unit-fast.config.ts src/agents/pi-embedded-runner/openai-stream-wrappers.test.ts`
- `git diff --check`
- `/home/captain/openclaw-source/node_modules/.bin/oxfmt --check --threads=1 <touched files>`
